title: coleus orthodontus
intro: Coleus orthodontus, also known as Toothache Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant contains a compound called spilanthol, which has been traditionally used to treat toothaches due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coleus orthodontus include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable natural remedy for oral health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions or tinctures, can be used to extract the active compounds and provide relief from toothache pain.
